ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "player_join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the organization */,
  "player_handicap" INTEGER /* Current handicap of the player */,
  "player_swing_type" TEXT /* Swing type of the player (right-handed or left-handed) */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_date" TEXT /* Date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "number_of_holes" INTEGER /* Number of holes in the tournament */,
  "par_score" INTEGER /* Par score for the tournament */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course where the tournament is held */,
  "course_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the golf course in yards */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the tournament */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the tournament */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the tournament */,
  "cut_line" INTEGER /* Score at which players are cut from the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score of the player in the tournament */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the player in the tournament */,
  "round_scores" TEXT /* JSON array storing the score for each round */,
  "total_putts" INTEGER /* Total number of putts made by the player in the tournament */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Total number of fairways hit by the player in the tournament */,
  "greens_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Total number of greens hit in regulation by the player in the tournament */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties incurred by the player in the tournament */,
  "finished_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds the player completed in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_participation_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_participation_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., ConsecutiveHolesBelowPar) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_year" INTEGER /* Year when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., tournament, practice session) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "ranking_week" TEXT /* Week when the ranking was recorded */,
  "rank_this_week" INTEGER /* Rank of the player this week */,
  "rank_last_week" INTEGER /* Rank of the player last week */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the ranking was recorded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the player in the current ranking */,
  "previous_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the player in the previous ranking */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Tournament, Exhibition) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players participating in the event */,
  "event_sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the event */,
  "event_prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the event */,
  "event_format" TEXT /* Format of the event (e.g., stroke play, match play) */,
  "event_par_score" INTEGER /* Par score for the event */,
  "event_course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course where the event is held */,
  "event_course_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the golf course in yards */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_event_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score of the player in the event */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the player in the event */,
  "round_scores" TEXT /* JSON array storing the score for each round */,
  "total_putts" INTEGER /* Total number of putts made by the player in the event */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Total number of fairways hit by the player in the event */,
  "greens_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Total number of greens hit in regulation by the player in the event */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties incurred by the player in the event */,
  "finished_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds the player completed in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_event_participation_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_event_participation_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Player, Coach, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array storing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "user_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  "accessed_page" TEXT /* Page or resource the user accessed */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical value was recorded */,
  "history_value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the historical date */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical record was created */,
  "previous_location" TEXT /* Previous location of the event */,
  "previous_number_of_players" INTEGER /* Previous number of players participating in the event */,
  "event_sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the event */,
  "event_prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the event */,
  "event_format" TEXT /* Format of the event (e.g., stroke play, match play) */,
  "event_par_score" INTEGER /* Par score for the event */,
  "event_course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course where the event was held */,
  "event_course_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the golf course in yards */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
